How can we help?

Browse our resources or reach out to the team directly.

Discord support server
Join our official Discord server to get real-time help from the Dracon team and community members.
Join Discord
Email support
Send us an email for account issues, billing inquiries, or partnership requests. We respond within 24 hours.
Send email
Documentation
Read the full documentation for all Dracon features, configuration guides, and troubleshooting tips.
View docs
Report a bug
Found an issue? Report bugs directly through our Discord server or via email and we'll fix it fast.
Report bug
FAQ

Frequently asked questions

How do I add Dracon to my server?
Click the "Invite bot" button in the navbar or visit our invite link. You'll need the "Manage Server" permission to add Dracon. Once added, use /setup to get started.
What permissions does Dracon need?
Dracon requests Administrator by default for full functionality. You can restrict permissions, but some features (like antinuke) require elevated permissions to work correctly.
Is Dracon free to use?
Yes! Dracon has a generous free tier with core moderation, welcome, tickets, and reaction roles. Premium unlocks antinuke, automod, unlimited features, and priority support.
How do I set up the antinuke system?
Antinuke is a Premium feature. Once subscribed, use /antinuke setup to configure thresholds, whitelist trusted admins, and choose punishment actions (ban, kick, derank).
Can I cancel my Premium subscription?
Yes, you can cancel anytime. Your Premium features will remain active until the end of your billing period. Contact our support team for refund requests.
Dracon isn't responding to my commands. What do I do?
First, check that Dracon has the right permissions in your channel. Use /ping to test if the bot is online. If issues persist, join our Discord support server for real-time help.
